# Load the provided JSON files and search for the intended ayah/hadith.
import json, re, unicodedata, difflib
from pathlib import Path

quran_path = Path("/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json")
hadith_path = Path("/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json")

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
    s = tashkeel.sub("", s)
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[\u0640\W]+", " ", s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # normalize hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ء","")
    # normalize ta marbuta to ha? typically leave; we'll keep as is
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

orig_full = "وَإِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ فَكَلِمَةُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا تَصْلَيَانِ"
snippet = "وَإِذْ قَا...َصْلَيَانِ"

norm_full = normalize_ar(orig_full)
norm_tokens = set(norm_full.split())

# Search Quran entries
qmatches = []
for entry in quran:
    text = entry.get("ayah_text","")
    n = normalize_ar(text)
    if norm_full and norm_full in n:
        qmatches.append((entry, "full_substring"))
    else:
        # token overlap score
        tokens = set(n.split())
        overlap = len(tokens & norm_tokens)
        if overlap >= max(2, len(norm_tokens)-1):  # generous
            qmatches.append((entry, f"overlap_{overlap}"))
# Also search for pieces like "واذ قال لهم رسلهم"
needle = normalize_ar("واذ قال لهم رسلهم")
for entry in quran:
    n = normalize_ar(entry.get("ayah_text",""))
    if needle in n:
        qmatches.append((entry, "phrase_wathk"))
        
len(qmatches), qmatches[:5]

# Search Quran for "قال لهم رسلهم"
phrase = normalize_ar("قال لهم رسلهم")
hits = []
for e in quran:
    n = normalize_ar(e.get("ayah_text",""))
    if phrase in n:
        hits.append(e)
len(hits), [h.get("ayah_text") for h in hits[:10]]

phrase = normalize_ar("قالت رسلهم")
hits = []
for e in quran:
    n = normalize_ar(e.get("ayah_text",""))
    if phrase in n:
        hits.append(e)
len(hits), [h.get("ayah_text") for h in hits[:10]]

# Find the two entries that start with "قَالَتْ رُسُلُهُمْ" and "قَالَتْ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ"
targets = []
for e in quran:
    t = e.get("ayah_text","")
    if t.startswith("۞ قَالَتْ رُسُلُهُمْ") or t.startswith("قَالَتْ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ"):
        targets.append(t)
targets

content.text: {"correction":"قَالَتْ لَهُمْ رُسُلُهُمْ إِنْ نَحْنُ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُكُمْ وَلَـٰكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَمُنُّ عَلَىٰ مَنْ يَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا أَنْ نَأْتِيَكُمْ بِسُلْطَانٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ"}
